summary: Backend testing completed for Brute Force Protection and Cold/Dry Orders Distance features. All 13 tests passed. Cold/dry orders: max distance between delivery locations is 3km. Market stores (سوبر ماركت الأمانة, بقالة السعادة) exist but don't have coordinates - live distance testing for cold orders would need coordinates set.
